SECONDDRAW-SCENT_POWER.title: Scent
SECONDDRAW-SCENT_POWER.description: At the start of next turn, gain [blue]3[/blue] [gold]Strength[/gold] this turn.
SECONDDRAW-SCENT_POWER.smartDescription: At the start of next turn, gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Strength[/gold] this turn.
SECONDDRAW-OPPORTUNITY_POWER.title: Opportunity
SECONDDRAW-OPPORTUNITY_POWER.description: Whenever you play a card that costs [blue]2[/blue] Energy or more, add 2 [gold]Shivs[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
SECONDDRAW-OPPORTUNITY_POWER.smartDescri: Whenever you play a card that costs {Energy:energyIcons()} or more, add {Amount} [gold]Shivs[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
